utterance:
{
  "utterance": "Empower the visually impaired with a groundbreaking, accessible app that turns any smartphone into a guide dog, enhancing their independence and safety.",
  "title": "GuideEye",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "GuideEye leverages advanced AI and haptic feedback to provide real-time navigation and object recognition, addressing a critical social issue with innovative technology.",
  "your_role": "pm_visionary"
}

{
  "utterance": "Imagine an app that erases your to-do list, encouraging mindfulness over productivity. This is 'The Forgetting Machine'.",
  "title": "The Forgetting Machine",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "By focusing on erasure and mindfulness, 'The Forgetting Machine' addresses the stress of constant task management, promoting a healthier approach to productivity.",
  "your_role": "presenter"
}

{
  "utterance": "Unlocking universal access to mental health care through AI-powered virtual therapists that adapt to individual needs, ensuring no one is left behind in the digital age.",
  "title": "MentalHealthAI",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "AI can provide personalized, accessible, and scalable mental health support, addressing the global shortage of mental health professionals.",
  "your_role": "pm_visionary"
}

{
  "utterance": "Imagine a digital morgue where the deceased are preserved in a virtual reality environment, allowing mourners to interact with the departed in an uncanny valley of digital resurrection. This is not just an app; it’s a philosophical exploration of our relationship with death.",
  "title": "Virtual Eternity",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "Virtual Eternity challenges the traditional understanding of death by offering a digital continuation of the human experience, providing a novel and controversial way to cope with loss.",
  "your_role": "pm_visionary"
}
